response.justification: The candidate is a very strong fit due to his extensive, hands-on experience building a geospatial data platform (GISCollective) and working on high-performance, low-latency distributed systems. While his direct C++ experience is not recent, his deep and current expertise in Dlang, a similar systems programming language, serves as an excellent proxy and strongly suggests he can quickly master the required modern C++ stack. His seniority level and demonstrated passion for the geospatial domain make him a compelling candidate worth interviewing.
strengths: Direct experience founding and developing a geospatial data platform (GISCollective).
Proven background in building high-performance, low-latency microservices for data integration.
Deep expertise in Dlang, a systems programming language with similarities to C++, demonstrating strong systems-level skills.
concerns: Professional C++ experience is not recent, dating back to 2015.
Geospatial experience is in general GIS data platforms, not specifically in routing tile generation or navigation.
Most recent roles have been focused on full-stack development with TypeScript/Node.js, not systems programming.
